## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss progress and next steps for ongoing client projects, with a focus on improving research and content development processes.](https://fathom.video/share/ygftxrisJWt4XsuXH4B_vdzeMzrjTgKj?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Listening tours with clients are yielding valuable insights and upsell opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/ygftxrisJWt4XsuXH4B_vdzeMzrjTgKj?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [Need to improve depth and specificity of competitor/audience research for client projects](https://fathom.video/share/ygftxrisJWt4XsuXH4B_vdzeMzrjTgKj?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [Emphasis on internalizing client context and continuously updating artifacts as products/strategies evolve](https://fathom.video/share/ygftxrisJWt4XsuXH4B_vdzeMzrjTgKj?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)
  - [Goal is to provide CMO-level strategic thinking and push clients creatively on content/marketing approaches](https://fathom.video/share/ygftxrisJWt4XsuXH4B_vdzeMzrjTgKj?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)

## Topics

  - [Engine Ramp: Blocked on client feedback. CMS walkthrough completed.](https://fathom.video/share/ygftxrisJWt4XsuXH4B_vdzeMzrjTgKj?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
